headline: Which stocks are set to benefit the most from the FIFA 2026 World Cup?
summary: Investing.com — The 2026 FIFA World Cup could provide a significant boost to several sectors, with companies in travel, sportswear, beverages, restaurants and entertainment expected to benefit the most from the global tournament, according to a Bernstein research note.
